form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr1) over 2125m at this track, at the bell was 9th-20.1 beaten 14 m by Elegant Stride (2:33.30) in NR up to 57 on April 9 at $10. At the start before solid effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 1780m after showing early speed at Redcliffe, beaten 2 m by Welease Woddewick (2:07.60) in 3yo+ NR 53 to 59 on April 1 at $3.50. Can do better from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr7) over 1730m after showing early speed and racing wide at Bathurst well beaten by She The Devil (2:02.60) in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $7. Showed ability the race before when she posted a big 7 m win when quickly away, (Fr4) at this track (2:03.20) beating Flo Ryda in NR up to 58 on March 12 at $4 at the bell was leading 3.49. Might need easier.

form.formComment: Eight-year-old gelding showed improvement last time. Surrendered the lead and finished 2nd (Fr1) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 3rd-11.55 beaten 8 m by Double It Harry (2:02.10) in NR up to 65 on April 9 at $4. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into ninth after being driven well back, behind Rudy Gee at this track over 2125m in a NR up to 63 on March 26 at $41. This looks a sterner test.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 9th (Fr2) over 2300m at Menangle, beaten 22 m by Oakie Smokeshow (2:44.60) in 4-020yo+ 0W/20K Stakes on April 11 at $81. The run before 8th (Fr3) over 1609m after showing early speed at Menangle was 2nd-4.86 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Colossal Hope (1:52.60) in NR up to 75 on March 10 at $11. This looks a nice assignment so has winning claims.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 8th (Fr4) over 1740m at Bankstown, beaten 40 m by Angus Finn (2:11.00) in NR up to 80 on March 16 at $61. Two runs back 6th (Fr3) over 1720m after showing early pace at this track was 5th-9m 2WWC at the bell, beaten 9 m by The Greek General (2:02.00) in NR up to 80 on December 4 at $19. Fitter and drops in grade so look for improvement.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into ninth behind Fe Fe On Fire at Menangle over 1609m in a NR up to 64 on April 7 at $26. Raced better the start before that with a good run when 2nd (Fr2) over 2125m at this track, at the bell was 5th-7.11 beaten 1.4 m by Rudy Gee (2:35.50) in NR up to 63 on March 26 at $8. Can bounce back with even luck.
